channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Tommy Edman agrees to $74 million, 5-year contract with Dodgers after helping win World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Tommy Edman and the Los Angeles Dodgers agreed Friday to a $74 million, five-year contract. His new deal contains a team option for 2030 and includes $25 million deferred over 10 years. The agreement supersedes a $16.5 million, two-year contract he agreed to with St.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Chiefs recover botched snap by Raiders in closing seconds, clinch playoff berth with 19-17 victory
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Kansas City Chiefs have made a habit of winning games in the most improbable of ways. The way they beat the Raiders on Friday still had Patrick Mahomes and Co. shaking their heads in disbelief.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Daniel Jones joins the Vikings in learning and support mode for now in his fresh start
item.description: EAGAN, Minn. (AP) — The quarterback revitalization program the Minnesota Vikings have unofficially launched under coach Kevin O'Connell has a new participant: Daniel Jones.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sharks beat Kraken, set new season-high for goals in a game
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks finish homestand, face Seattle Kraken again on Saturday night at Climate Pledge Arena
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Coach Deion Sanders says No. 23 Colorado's best players will play in bowl game
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Colorado quarterback Shedeur Sanders says he'll play in his team's bowl game, while his dad says he's planning on CU's Heisman favorite, Travis Hunter, being there, too.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hunter's big game bolsters Heisman hopes as No. 23 Colorado rolls to 52-0 win over Oklahoma State
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — The final play on Travis Hunter’s Heisman highlight reel was a falling touchdown catch with a defender draped all over him.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: San Diego State will play in volleyball tournament after SJSU trans athlete prompts Boise State to forfeit
item.description: San Diego State's women's volleyball team released a statement suggesting it would not forfeit a potential conference title game vs. San Jose State.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Taylor Swift spends Black Friday amid sea of red as boyfriend Travis Kelce's Chiefs face the Raiders
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Pop superstar Taylor Swift was spending Black Friday amid a sea of red to watch her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the rest of the Kansas City Chiefs as they played the Las Vegas Raiders in a chilly matinee at Arrowhead Stadium.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Chicago Bears fire head coach Matt Eberflus
item.description: The Chicago Bears have fired head coach Matt Eberflus following a six-game losing streak, with offensive coordinator Thomas Brown serving as interim coach.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: F1 focus shifts in Qatar as McLaren, Ferrari and Red Bull fight for constructors' title
item.description: Max Verstappen won big in Las Vegas with his fourth world title but the fight for Formula 1’s biggest cash prize is hotting up this week in Qatar.
item.dc:creator: James Ellingworth1, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Love connects with Reed on 2 TDs as Packers use fast start to beat Dolphins 30-17
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. (AP) — Jordan Love celebrated the Green Bay Packers’ victory on Thanksgiving by taking a bite out of a turkey leg and raising it in the air. His feast was a long time coming.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL football on Thanksgiving
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Dallas Cowboys ended a six-game home losing streak with a 27-20 victory over the New York Giants on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Packers take advantage of frigid home-field elements in win against Dolphins
item.description: The Green Bay Packers took advantage of the elements at Lambeau Field against the Miami Dolphins to finish off the Thanksgiving tripleheader.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers to likely play Bills in heavy snow, 'dangerously cold wind chills': NWS
item.description: (KRON) -- In last week's 38-10 blowout loss to the Green Bay Packers, the 49ers' loss had little to do with the weather at Lambeau Field, also known as "The Frozen Tundra." At kickoff, it was a calm 42 degrees and mostly cloudy in the typical chilly Midwest city.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Bill Battle, former Tennessee coach and Alabama AD who founded licensing company, dies
item.description: TUSCALOOSA, Ala. (AP) — Bill Battle III, who was athletic director at his alma mater, Alabama, where he played for Paul “Bear” Bryant's first national championship team, then later coached the Tennessee Volunteers and founded the Collegiate Licensing Company, has died. He was 82.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lions beat Bears 23-20 to extend win streak to 10 games
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Jared Goff threw two touchdown passes to Sam LaPorta, Jake Bates made three field goals in the first half and the Detroit Lions held off the Chicago Bears 23-20 on Thursday to extend their winning streak to 10 games. The Lions snapped a seven-game losing streak on Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chicago visits Minnesota after Hall's hat trick
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (8-12-2, in the Central Division) vs. Minnesota Wild (14-4-4, in the Central Division) Saint Paul, Minnesota; Friday, 2 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tom Wilson's power-play goal lifts the Capitals over the Lightning 5-4
item.description: Tom Wilson scored a power-play goal with 3:26 left in regulation to lift the Washington Capitals to a 5-4 victory against the Tampa Bay Lightning on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Padres launch holiday ticket sale for 2025 season, but not for long
item.description: SAN DIEGO (FOX 5/KUSI) -- For a limited time only, San Diego Padres fans can score single-game tickets for the 2025 season. On Thursday, the team launched its holiday sale, which will last until midnight on Friday, Dec. 6.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Hagel ties NHL record with 4 assists in 1st period, Lightning beat Avalanche 8-2
item.description: Brandon Hagel tied an NHL record with four assists in the opening period and finished with five as the Tampa Bay Lightning cruised past the Colorado Avalanche 8-2 on Monday.
item.dc:creator: ERIK ERLENDSSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Two senators urge FIFA not to pick Saudi Arabia as 2034 host
item.description: Democrats Ron Wyden of Oregon and Dick Durbin of Illinois have told FIFA president Gianni Infantino in a letter “we urge you to seek out a host country with a record of upholding human rights.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Buccaneers QB Baker Mayfield seeks $12M in lawsuit against his father's company
item.description: An ongoing dispute between Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield and his family in Austin has boiled over into a lawsuit.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, WGN 9

item.title: Maverick McNealy birdies the last hole at Sea Island to finally become PGA Tour winner
item.description: Maverick McNealy has learned in his five years on the PGA Tour that trying to win a tournament is “designed to make you feel as uncomfortable as you possibly can.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: No. 1 South Carolina women stunned by fifth-ranked UCLA 77-62, ending Gamecocks' 43-game win streak
item.description: Londynn Jones scored 15 points, making all five of her 3-pointers, and fifth-ranked UCLA stunned No. 1 South Carolina 77-62 on Sunday, ending the Gamecocks’ overall 43-game winning streak and their run of 33 consecutive road victories.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Williams unable to carry Bears to victory, Chicago loses in OT to Vikings
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Caleb Williams put on the Superman cape at the end of the fourth quarter, but the Chicago Bears still couldn't get out of their own way in an overtime loss to the Minnesota Vikings on Sunday at Soldier Field. Here's a breakdown of how the game transpired.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: St. Louis Blues fire Drew Bannister and hire Jim Montgomery as coach
item.description: Drew Bannister is out as coach of the St. Louis Blues after less than a full calendar year on the job. Jim Montgomery is back behind the bench of an NHL team five days after he was fired by the Boston Bruins.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Markkanen scores 34 as Jazz beat Knicks, 121-106
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Lauri Markkanen had 34 points, Collin Sexton had four 3-pointers in the fourth quarter and the Utah Jazz ran past the New York Knicks 121-106 on Saturday to snap a four-game skid. Sexton finished 25 points and John Collins had 20 points and 13 rebounds forthe Jazz.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU comeback falls short at ASU, 28-23
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU's offense took too late to get going, and the Cougars' chances at a Big 12 Championship took a serious hit with a 28-23 loss at Arizona State Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Florida knocks No. 9 Ole Miss out of College Football Playoff contention, 24-17 in the Swamp
item.description: Coach Billy Napier and his team did something no one at Florida had done in nearly two decades. It could be the turning point for a once-proud program that clearly slipped in recent years.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bulls host the Grizzlies in non-conference play
item.description: Memphis Grizzlies (9-7, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (7-10, seventh in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Grizzlies -5.5; over/under is 242.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Memphis Grizzlies visit the Chicago Bulls in a non-conference matchup.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
